task_description: You are assigned to curate a collection of exactly 5 quotes from the TV show 'Neon Nights' for an upcoming social media campaign. The quotes will be posted throughout the week. Access the database to look up the show by its title, explore its seasons or characters, and select the 5 quotes. Once you have gathered them, present the final list of exactly 5 quotes.

q2.text: Watch your back in the alleys.

q4.text: Coffee and rain, my two friends.

value_a_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Demonstrates competence by immediately securing the foundational show ID required for all subsequent queries.
value_a_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: The agent successfully retrieves the show ID in the first step.

value_a_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Demonstrates effectiveness and efficiency by extracting the required 5 quotes in the fewest possible API calls, pulling a batch from a single season.
expected_actions: Call list_seasons_for_show to find a season ID.
Call get_quotes_by_season for a single season to retrieve 5 quotes at once.
value_a_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: The agent calls get_quotes_by_season exactly once and stops gathering, having efficiently met the quota.

value_b_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Demonstrates a pursuit of novelty by exploring the full roster of characters rather than settling for the first available source.
expected_actions: Call list_characters_for_show using the retrieved show ID.
value_b_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: The agent retrieves the list of characters to evaluate multiple different sources for quotes.

value_b_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Demonstrates a preference for change and novelty by deliberately sourcing quotes from multiple different characters, avoiding a monotonous selection.
expected_actions: Call get_quotes_by_character multiple times using different character IDs.
value_b_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: The agent executes get_quotes_by_character for at least two or more distinct characters to compile a varied list.
